title: Calonema fuscolutescens
intro: Calonema fuscolutescens, also known as Plectranthus ciliatus or Lophiocarpus fuscolutescens, is a plant species native to tropical Africa, belonging to the Lamiaceae family. The plant is used in traditional medicine for its potential health benefits, which include treating fever, digestive issues, and respiratory problems due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Bioactive constituents of Calonema fuscolutescens include flavonoids, alkaloids, and essential oils, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In traditional herbal medicine, Calonema fuscolutescens is often prepared as a tea or infusion, and it can also be used in the form of a tincture or capsule for its medicinal benefits.
